title: Google Cloud VMware Engine Private Cloud
description: Represents a VMware Engine private cloud resource, including its configuration, state, network settings, and management cluster.

name.description: The resource name of this private cloud.

description.description: User-provided description for this private cloud.

networkConfig.description: Network configuration for the private cloud.

managementCidr.description: Management CIDR used by VMware management appliances.

vmwareEngineNetwork.description: The relative resource name of the VMware Engine network.

managementCluster.description: The management cluster for this private cloud.

clusterId.description: The user-provided identifier of the management cluster.

nodeTypeConfigs.description: Node type configurations for the management cluster.

updateTime.description: Last update time of the resource.

expireTime.description: Time when the resource will be irreversibly purged.
